title: Mythical Lands — Rise of the Gods
description: Embark on a mythic adventure where ancient gods awaken, granting unique powers, epic quests, and divine challenges across mystical realms.
body:
# ⚡ Mythical Lands — Rise of the Gods ⚡

**🏛️ **Version:** Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge / NeoForge)**

**🎮 **Genre:** Adventure • RPG • Mythology • Exploration**

**💀 **Difficulty:** Medium–Hard**

---

## 🌌 Introduction 🌌

After millennia of silence, the **ancient gods** have awakened.  
The realms are divided once again: **Olympus**, **Asgard**, **Duat**, and **Avalon** are at war for control over the mortal world.

Your mission: **swear allegiance to a deity**, earn their favor, and reclaim the power of the **sealed Titans**.  
But beware... the gods are fickle, and every blessing comes with a curse.

---

## ⚙️ Key Features ⚙️

- 🔱 **God System** – Pledge loyalty to a deity and gain unique divine abilities.  
- 📜 **RPG Questlines** – Story-driven missions with multiple paths and rewards.  
- 🕍 **New Dimensions** – Explore divine realms inspired by ancient mythology.  
- ⚔️ **Epic Bosses** – Fight powerful mythical entities with custom mechanics.  
- 🧙 **Advanced Magic** – Multiple magic systems with progressive spells and rituals.  
- 🌄 **Expansive Exploration** – Discover temples, ruins, and ancient secrets.  
- 🏗️ **Detailed Decoration** – Build temples, shrines, and divine cities.  

---

## 🧙 Magic and Divine Powers 🧙

- **Electroblob’s Wizardry** – Classic spellcasting and magic progression.  
- **Mahou Tsukai** – Ritual-based and rune-inspired advanced magic.  
- **Ars Nouveau** – Modular, customizable spell system.  
- **Artifacts** – Rare mythical relics with passive powers.  
- **Curios API** – Support for divine accessories and trinkets.  

---

## 🗺️ Exploration and Adventure 🗺️

- **When Dungeons Arise** – Massive hand-crafted dungeons.  
- **YUNG’s Better Dungeons / Strongholds / Mineshafts** – Revamped world structures.  
- **Alex’s Mobs** – Realistic and mythical creatures.  
- **The Twilight Forest** – Mystical forests and legendary bosses.  
- **Blue Skies** – New dimensions inspired by heaven and the underworld.  
- **Bosses of Mass Destruction** – Epic boss battles against ancient beings.  

---

## 🏛️ Building and Atmosphere 🏛️

- **Macaw’s Mods** – Furniture, roofs, bridges, and decorations.  
- **Supplementaries / Handcrafted / Chisel & Bits** – High-detail architecture tools.  
- **Oh The Biomes You’ll Go** – Expansive new biomes and landscapes.  
- **Dramatic Skys + Complementary Shaders** – Divine and cinematic visuals.  

---

## ⚒️ Progression and Balance ⚒️

- **FTB Quests** – Create divine questlines and story branches.  
- **Patchouli** – In-game lore and guides.  
- *(Optional)* **Custom NPCs / KubeJS** – Dialogue and divine event scripting.  

---

## ⚔️ The Pantheon System (recommended setup) ⚔️

Using **FTB Quests** or **Custom NPCs**, you can create a full pantheon with unique powers:

| God | Element | Abilities |
|------|----------|------------|
| **Zeus** | Thunder | Lightning strikes, weather control, AoE damage |
| **Poseidon** | Water | Summon sea creatures, underwater breathing |
| **Hades** | Darkness | Necromancy, hellfire, soul manipulation |
| **Odin** | Wisdom | Runes, berserker rage, ancient knowledge |
| **Ra** | Light | Solar fire, sandstorms, divine blessings |
| **Anubis** | Death | Curses, soul control, teleportation |

---

## 🎯 Main Objective 🎯

Defeat the **sealed Titans** deep beneath the world and claim the **Throne of the Gods**.  
Your final choice will decide the fate of all realms:  
Will you **ascend as a god**... or **bring the pantheon to ruin**?

---

## 🧩 Recommended Settings 🧩

- Difficulty: **Hard**  
- **KeepInventory: false** (for a more epic experience)  
- Enable **Dynamic Surroundings** + **Complementary Shaders** for cinematic immersion.  
- Mode: **Survival / RPG**  
- Great for **solo or co-op** mythic adventures.  

---

## 💡 Tags 💡
`rpg` `adventure` `mythology` `exploration` `bosses` `magic` `lore` `fantasy` `gods`  

---

## 📜 Credits 📜
Modpack concept and design by **Bordecor**
Inspired by Greek, Norse, and Egyptian mythology.  

---

> ⚠️ This modpack is built for players who crave an immersive RPG experience filled with divine powers, exploration, and ancient lore.  
> Prepare your offerings, adventurer... the gods are watching. ⚡
